summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GreenLink Marketplace features: Orange Money payment simulation, reviews, wishlist, cart, checkout, and buyer orders. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI is functional with proper French interface.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts click on star rating in review form, making it difficult to select ratings

action_items: Consider adding z-index fix for star rating clicks in ProductDetailModal review form

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features working, minor modal overlay issue

seed_data_creation: Test orders created via checkout flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All marketplace features verified working. Orange Money payment is in SIMULATION MODE - use /api/payments/simulate/{token}?action=success to simulate payments. Test buyer has orders visible in /buyer/orders. Wishlist persists across sessions.

backend_apis.payment_initiate: PASS - /api/payments/initiate creates payment with SIM_ token
backend_apis.product_reviews_add: PASS - Authentication required, returns 401 without auth
backend_apis.cart_get: PASS - /api/marketplace/cart returns cart with enriched items
backend_apis.cart_add: PASS - /api/marketplace/cart/add adds product with stock check
backend_apis.supplier_notifications: PASS - /api/marketplace/notifications returns list with order types

frontend_features.marketplace_page: PASS - Products displayed with prices, ratings, wishlist hearts
frontend_features.wishlist_toggle: PASS - Heart icon toggles, 'Mes favoris (N)' updates
frontend_features.wishlist_page: PASS - Shows saved items with remove and add-to-cart buttons
frontend_features.add_to_cart: PASS - Toast notification, cart badge updates
frontend_features.cart_slideout: PASS - Shows items, total, 'Passer la commande' button
frontend_features.checkout_page: PASS - Address, phone, payment method selection
frontend_features.orange_money_option: PASS - Shows 'Mode Test' badge and simulation warning
frontend_features.buyer_orders_page: PASS - Lists orders with status badges (En attente, Confirmée)
frontend_features.product_modal: PASS - Opens with details, Avis tab for reviews
frontend_features.reviews_form: PASS - Star rating, comment textarea, submit button visible

mocked_apis_confirmed: Orange Money API is SIMULATED - payments are not real
SMS notifications are logged to console, not sent to real phones
